summary: Iteration 38 - Testing Commission Rate & Billing Cycle features for quote-based subscription system. All 10 features verified: Backend APIs (PUT /api/admin/quotes with commission_rate/billing_cycle, GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription, GET /api/subscriptions/quote/my-quote all returning pricing fields), Frontend Admin (quote detail shows commission input for fournisseurs, billing cycle selector, pricing summary), Frontend Supplier Dashboard (active subscription banner shows Abonnement 35000 XOF/mois, Commission 5%, Facturation Mensuelle), Frontend Homepage (Fournisseurs card includes 'Commission 3 a 5% sur chaque vente'). Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteAdminAction model correctly accepts commission_rate (float) and billing_cycle (string) fields
PUT /api/admin/quotes stores commission_rate and billing_cycle in both quote and subscription documents
GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription returns price_xof, commission_rate, billing_cycle from subscription
GET /api/subscriptions/quote/my-quote returns commission_rate, billing_cycle, subscription_duration_days for approved quotes
QuotesManagement.jsx shows commission rate input (3-5%) for fournisseur type quotes only
QuotesManagement.jsx displays pricing summary (Recapitulatif) before approval with montant + commission + duree
QuotesManagement.jsx shows 'Tarification approuvee' section for approved quotes with price and commission
SubscriptionBanner.jsx correctly displays pricing cards for active subscriptions (Abonnement XOF/mois, Commission %, Facturation cycle)
PricingSection.jsx shows Fournisseurs card with 'Commission 3 a 5% sur chaque vente' in features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified all commission/billing features. The fournisseur 'intrants-ci@test.com' has an approved quote with price_xof=35000, commission_rate=5, billing_cycle=monthly. Their supplier dashboard (/supplier/dashboard) shows the active subscription banner with pricing cards displaying: Abonnement 35000 XOF/mois, Commission sur ventes 5%, Facturation Mensuelle. Admin quotes management (/admin/quotes) shows approved quotes with 'Tarification approuvee' section displaying price and commission. Currently 0 pending quotes, 3 approved, 1 rejected, 4 active accounts.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway, Email Service (MOCK mode) are MOCKED
